creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks a lot. One major concern is the complexity of the extension and maintaining it within an update and upgrade process.

Ideally, upstream bugzilla would receive the abilities to let users edit descriptions and comments in a transparent manner out of the box.

Right now there are several things with a higher priority to be done within our bugzilla environment, so this enhancement will be investigated more deeply at a later time.
